zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Despenser於大約1365年出生在英國英格蘭盧特藍德艾森丁時，她的父親Edward Despenser II30歲，母親Elizabeth de Burghersh24歲。她於1385年與Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley在英國斯塔福爾哈特利 霍爾梅結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1415年在英國瓦維其可爾梅列瓦列享年51歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾梅列瓦列。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Despenser于大约1365年出生在英国英格兰盧特藍德艾森丁时，她的父亲Edward Despenser II30岁，母亲Elizabeth de Burghersh24岁。她于1385年与Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley在英国斯塔福爾哈特利 霍爾梅结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1415年在英国瓦維其可爾梅列瓦列享年51岁，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾梅列瓦列。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Despenser was born about 1365, in Essendine, Rutland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Edward Despenser II, was 30 and her mother, Elizabeth de Burghersh, was 24. She married Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley in 1385, in Chartley Holme, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1415, in Merevale, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 51, and was buried in Merevale, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Despenser est née environ 1365, à Essendine, Rutland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edward Despenser II, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Burghersh, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley en 1385, à Chartley Holme, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1415, à Merevale, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Merevale, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Despenser um 1365 in Essendine, Rutland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edward Despenser II 30 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Burghersh 24. Sie hat 1385 in Chartley Holme, Staffordshire, England Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1415 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Merevale, Warwickshire, England und wurde in Merevale, Warwickshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Despenser è nata il circa 1365 nel Essendine, Rutland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Edward Despenser II, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Burghersh, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley nel 1385, nel Chartley Holme, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1415, nel Merevale, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a Merevale, Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Despenserが約1365年にイギリスイギリスルトランドエセンディンで生まれた時，父Edward Despenser IIは30歳，母Elizabeth de Burghershは24歳であった。1385年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアチャートリー ホールメでRobert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1415年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアメレベルで51歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアメレベルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Despenser(이)가 대략 1365년 영국 잉글랜드 루틀랜드 에센딘에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Despenser II(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Burghersh(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1385년 영국 스태퍼드실르 처틀리 홀에서 Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1415년 영국 워윅실르 머에발에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 머에발에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Despenser nasceu aproximadamente 1365, em Essendine, Rutland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Edward Despenser II, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Burghersh, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley em 1385, em Chartley Holme, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1415, em Merevale, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em Merevale, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Despenser родилась около 1365 г. в местности эссенден, рутланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Edward Despenser II было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Burghersh, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley в 1385 г. в местности чартли холм, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1415 г. в местности миревеил, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности миревеил, варвиккшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Despenser nació aproximadamente 1365, en Essendine, Rutland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Edward Despenser II, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Burghersh, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley en 1385, en Chartley Holme, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1415, en Merevale, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Merevale, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
